SONIC.name: Sonic Thaumaturgy
SONIC.description: The art of sonic manipulation and harmonic resonance

PSYCHIC.name: Psychic Schism
PSYCHIC.description: Mental discipline and psychic energy projection

VOID.name: The Void
VOID.description: The space between spaces, where entropy reigns

ALCHEMY.name: Verbal Alchemy
ALCHEMY.description: The transmutation of meaning through spoken word

WILL.name: Willpower Surge
WILL.description: Focusing raw will into reality-altering force

NECROMANCY.name: Necromancy
NECROMANCY.description: Communication with and manipulation of life force

ABJURATION.name: Abjuration
ABJURATION.description: Protective magic and negation of effects

verseIR.rawText:
Resonant thunder braids the oracle of glass.
Mercurial roses open where the warding vowels burn.
I cast my will through silver breath and grave-green dusk.
The abyss answers softly, but the bright sigils return.

mercurial roses open where the warding vowels burn.
i cast my will through silver breath and grave-green dusk.
the abyss answers softly, but the bright sigils return.
